message:
Clarify Content-Type inference behavior in http.mdx

The operator tries to infer the format rather than always succeeding.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -20,8 +20,8 @@ you will get a warning.
 In both cases, you can only provide static header data.
 
 Use [`from_http`](/reference/operators/from_http) to perform HTTP requests or
-run an HTTP server. This operator automatically infers the format from the
-`Content-Type` header, defaulting to JSON. For sending, use
+run an HTTP server. This operator automatically tries to infer the format from the
+`Content-Type` header. For sending, use
 [`save_http`](/reference/operators/save_http) with a write operator.
 
 ## Examples
